name: TARGET CORP
summary: Target Corporation, incorporated in Minnesota in 1902, operates as a single-segment retailer offering fashionable merchandise and everyday essentials at discounted prices. Products span six core categories including general merchandise and groceries, sold through physical stores and digital channels. Approximately 30% of merchandise sales come from owned and exclusive brands. Stores fulfill over 97% of total merchandise sales and serve as fulfillment hubs for digital orders.

products.name: Owned Brands (e.g., Good & Gather, Cat & Jack, All in Motion)
products.description: Proprietary merchandise brands spanning food, apparel, home, and more, comprising ~30% of merchandise sales.

products.name: Target Circle
products.description: Customer loyalty program offering free membership, instant discounts, and Target Circle Rewards redeemable on future purchases.

products.name: Target Circle Card
products.description: Debit, credit, and Mastercard offerings providing 5% discount on purchases, free shipping, and extended returns.

products.name: Target Circle 360
products.description: Paid membership providing unlimited same-day delivery, free shipping, and exclusive member deals.

products.name: Target Plus
products.description: Third-party digital marketplace selling complementary assortment from external sellers alongside Target's own merchandise.

products.name: Roundel
products.description: Advertising services platform serving vendors, third parties, and marketplace sellers.

products.name: Order Pickup / Drive Up / Same-Day Delivery
products.description: Suite of same-day fulfillment options fulfilled primarily from Target stores.

partnerships.description: Shop-in-shop experience offering Apple products within Target stores.
Shop-in-shop experience offering Levi's merchandise within Target stores.
Shop-in-shop operating agreement; mutual agreement reached in 2025 to terminate when it expires in August 2026.
In-store amenity generating revenue from Starbucks locations within Target stores.
Operates pharmacies and clinics in Target stores under a perpetual operating agreement generating annual occupancy income.
Exclusive owned brand developed in partnership with Magnolia, sold in Target stores and digital channels.
